title: Optimization
description: 🪽 Maximum performance, eliminates stuttering, and speeds up anything while not breaking vanilla. Sodium, Vulkan, Embeddium and Nothirium. Used to be called Wing.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b6ab12fe78224449b34eadd3eee6b2a77ef0364_0.webp)
# ⭐ Optimization Modpack
**This is a lightweight modpack focused on optimization, aiming to maximize performance. It consists only of well-chosen optimization mods, with no unnecessary mods included, which sets it apart from others**
## ✨ Features
- **Maximum performance**
- **Fast updates**
- **Pre-configured settings**
- **Wide selection([Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Vulkan](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod), [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium) and [Celeritas](https://git.taumc.org/embeddedt/celeritas))**
## 💽 Installation
- **Use the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app) or use other launchers that can install modpacks from Modrinth, such as [PrismLaucher](https://prismlauncher.org/)**
- **If you are using a official launcher, convert the .mrpack to .zip using the [Modrinth Pack to Zip Converter](https://jamie.codeberg.page/mrpack-to-zip/@master/)**
## 🧩Java and Flags
- **Use [Java Eclipse Temurin 25](https://adoptium.net/) with the following flags: `-XX:+UseZGC -XX:+UseCompactObjectHeaders`**
- **For more details, [read the article](https://unascribed.com/garden/jvm-args/)**
